heading: Warrant officer active-duty list: exclusions
label: 582 Warrant officer active-duty list: exclusions
notes: Amendments2004—Par. (1). amended par. (1) generally. Prior to amendment, par. (1) read as follows: “Reserve warrant officers—Pub. L. 108–375“(A) on active duty for training;“(B) on active duty under in connection with organizing, administering, recruiting, instructing, or training the reserve components;section 12301(d) of this title“(C) on active duty to pursue special work;“(D) ordered to active duty under ; orsection 12304 of this title“(E) on full-time National Guard duty.”1996—Par. (1)(B). substituted “section 12301(d)” for “section 672(d)”.Pub. L. 104–106Par. (1)(D). substituted “section 12304” for “section 673b”.Pub. L. 104–1061994—Par. (2). inserted before period at end “(other than retired warrant officers who were recalled to active duty before , and have served continuously on active duty since that date)”.Pub. L. 103–337February 1, 1992
